items.title: #NBASky / #SkyHoops: Was Indiana offering Deandre Ayton a huge deal the last time a team made a real run at an RFA?
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
#NBASky / #SkyHoops: Was Indiana offering Deandre Ayton a huge deal the last time a team made a real run at an RFA? 

I realize there's only a couple of teams *currently* with cap space, but I'm fascinated by what can happen with Walker Kessler/Jalen Duren/Tari Eason.
